'''âf-m-f''' ('''kafamaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monstrosify|monstrosify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monstrosify|monstrosify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| kafamaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifamaf|thifamaf]] || [[word:jifamaf|jifamaf]] || [[word:shifamaf|shifamaf]] || [[word:kifamaf|kifamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufamaf|thuthufamaf]] || [[word:jujufamaf|jujufamaf]] || [[word:shushufamaf|shushufamaf]] || [[word:kukufamaf|kukufamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufamaf|thufamaf]] || [[word:jufamaf|jufamaf]] || [[word:shufamaf|shufamaf]] || [[word:kufamaf|kufamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufamaf|thufamaf]] || [[word:jufamaf|jufamaf]] || [[word:shufamaf|shufamaf]] || [[word:kufamaf|kufamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefamaf|thefamaf]] || [[word:jefamaf|jefamaf]] || [[word:shefamaf|shefamaf]] || [[word:kefamaf|kefamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofamaf|thothofamaf]] || [[word:jojofamaf|jojofamaf]] || [[word:shoshofamaf|shoshofamaf]] || [[word:kokofamaf|kokofamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamaf|thofamaf]] || [[word:jofamaf|jofamaf]] || [[word:shofamaf|shofamaf]] || [[word:kofamaf|kofamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamaf|thofamaf]] || [[word:jofamaf|jofamaf]] || [[word:shofamaf|shofamaf]] || [[word:kofamaf|kofamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚfamaf|thĂŚfamaf]] || [[word:jĂŚfamaf|jĂŚfamaf]] || [[word:shĂŚfamaf|shĂŚfamaf]] || [[word:kĂŚfamaf|kĂŚfamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafamaf|thathafamaf]] || [[word:jajafamaf|jajafamaf]] || [[word:shashafamaf|shashafamaf]] || [[word:kakafamaf|kakafamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafamaf|thafamaf]] || [[word:jafamaf|jafamaf]] || [[word:shafamaf|shafamaf]] || [[word:kafamaf|kafamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafamaf|thafamaf]] || [[word:jafamaf|jafamaf]] || [[word:shafamaf|shafamaf]] || [[word:kafamaf|kafamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafamaf|shafamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafamaf|goshafamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafamaf|gokishafamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafamafnĂź|shafamafnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafamafnknĂź|goshafamafnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamafnĂź|gokishafamafnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafamafshĂŤ|shafamafshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafamafnkshĂŤ|goshafamafnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafamafshĂŤ|gokishafamafshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamafro|shafamafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamafnkro|goshafamafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamafro|gokishafamafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamafmu|shafamafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamafnkmu|goshafamafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamafmu|gokishafamafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafamafsher|shafamafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafamafnksher|goshafamafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafamafsher|gokishafamafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafamafng|shafamafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafamafnkng|goshafamafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafamafng|gokishafamafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafamafya|shafamafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafamafnkya|goshafamafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafamafya|gokishafamafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafamafyam|shafamafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafamafnkyam|goshafamafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafamafyam|gokishafamafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamafnĂźshĂŤ|shafamafnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamafnknĂźshĂŤ|goshafamafnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamafnĂźshĂŤ|gokishafamafnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamafnĂźro|shafamafnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamafnknĂźro|goshafamafnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamafnĂźro|gokishafamafnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamafnĂźmu|shafamafnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamafnknĂźmu|goshafamafnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamafnĂźmu|gokishafamafnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamafshĂŤnĂź|shafamafshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamafnkshĂŤnĂź|goshafamafnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamafshĂŤnĂź|gokishafamafshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamafshĂŤro|shafamafshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamafnkshĂŤro|goshafamafnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamafshĂŤro|gokishafamafshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamafshĂŤmu|shafamafshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamafnkshĂŤmu|goshafamafnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamafshĂŤmu|gokishafamafshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamafronĂź|shafamafronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamafnkronĂź|goshafamafnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamafronĂź|gokishafamafronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamafroshĂŤ|shafamafroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamafnkroshĂŤ|goshafamafnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamafroshĂŤ|gokishafamafroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamafromu|shafamafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamafnkromu|goshafamafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamafromu|gokishafamafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamafmunĂź|shafamafmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamafnkmunĂź|goshafamafnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamafmunĂź|gokishafamafmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamafmushĂŤ|shafamafmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamafnkmushĂŤ|goshafamafnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamafmushĂŤ|gokishafamafmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamafmuro|shafamafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamafnkmuro|goshafamafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamafmuro|gokishafamafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
